implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-001: main() entry point with __name__ guard
AC-002: Recursive scanning of all status directories
AC-003: Frontmatter parsing via task_utils (no duplicate YAML logic)
AC-004: Schema v1 JSON with fixed key order and sorted tasks

completion_promises.criterion_text: installer/core/commands/lib/task_status_json.py exists with a main() entry point and if __name__ == '__main__': guard
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation file exists at installer/core/commands/lib/task_status_json.py with main() function and if __name__ == '__main__': main() guard. Test TestMain validates CLI behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Scans tasks/backlog/, tasks/in_progress/, tasks/in_review/, tasks/blocked/, tasks/completed/ recursively (including feature subfolders and archive folders)
completion_promises.evidence: scan_task_files() iterates STATUS_DIRS and uses rglob('*.md') for recursive scanning. Test TestScanTaskFiles.test_finds_all_status_dirs verifies all status dirs including nested feature subfolder (feat-sub) and archive folder (2026-01).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Parses frontmatter via task_utils.parse_task_frontmatter (no duplicate YAML-parsing logic)
completion_promises.evidence: parse_task_record() imports and calls parse_task_frontmatter from installer.core.commands.lib.task_utils. No duplicate YAML parsing. Test TestParseTaskRecord.test_invalid_frontmatter_returns_none verifies graceful handling of malformed frontmatter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Emits schema v1 JSON to stdout with fixed key order and tasks sorted by (status, id)
completion_promises.evidence: build_dashboard() emits JSON with schema_version='1.0', fixed OUTPUT_KEYS order, and tasks sorted by (status, id). Tests TestBuildDashboard.test_fixed_key_order_top_level, test_fixed_key_order_task, test_tasks_sorted_by_status_then_id, and test_deterministic_output all pass.
